title: Upgrade to Premium
subtitle: Complete your payment to unlock all features
noPlans: No premium plans available. Please contact admin.

pending.title: Waiting for Payment
pending.description: Complete your payment in the DOKU payment page. This page will update automatically once payment is confirmed.

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.description: Your Premium plan is now active. Enjoy unlimited email creation and all premium features!

expired.title: Payment Expired
expired.description: Your payment session has expired. Please try again to complete the purchase.

failed.title: Payment Failed
failed.description: Something went wrong with your payment. Please try again or contact support.
